description: Malaysia's leading OSAT and EMS company. Services: DC and RF wafer testing, wafer back-grinding, wafer sawing (dicing), wire bonding, substrate molding, flip-chip dice tape-and-reel, automated visual inspection. Investing in SiP, flip-chip, and 2.5D packaging for AI/HPC. Key customer: Broadcom (RF filters for Apple iPhone). 11 plants across Malaysia, Philippines, China. 6,000+ employees. Market cap ~6.7B MYR.

majorSuppliers: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - wafer probing and dicing equipment
_externalRelationships.notes: Bursa Malaysia listed. HQ Bayan Lepas, Penang. Accretech Malaysia has offices in Penang (same location). Wafer probing, wafer sawing, and back-grinding are core services.

_metadata.dataSource: Inari Amertron IR, Bursa Malaysia, industry research
